body.title: Builder process memory lives instance-local (~/.claude) — mirror load-bearing entries into the repo store
body.description:
intention: I intend that a fresh builder on any box inherits the corrected working style from the repo, not from one instance's private memory dir.

rebuildability-diff.20260707.md F2 (CRITICAL): ~120 auto-memory entries (proof gotchas, device roster, one-CC-at-a-time, Granny never-spawns, stash/checkout hazards, escalation-is-spec-quality-data, calm signals...) exist only in ~/.claude/projects/-home-akien-dev-src-UnseenUniversity/memory/ — outside the repo. Violates the external-state principle devices are held to. Shape: triage each entry — (a) already in a decision/rule -> skip; (b) load-bearing process feedback -> becomes/extends a rules/ artifact (with T-rules-store-materialize) or a note; (c) personal-to-Akien or ephemeral -> stays local. The local dir remains the working cache; the repo becomes the source of durable process feedback.

**Affected files:** devlab/runtime/memory/rules/ + devlab/runtime/memory/notes/ (new artifacts); ~/.claude memory dir read-only for triage

**Design rules:** export-not-copy (generalize into the shared substrate); one home; no duplication without a superseding pointer

**Scope boundary:** triage + mirror of load-bearing entries only; NO deletion of local memories; no automation of future sync (that is a follow-on design question, noted in the close).

**Test plan:** no code tests — content migration; spot-check list of migrated entry -> store artifact mappings committed as part of the note.

**Completion criteria:** a triage table (entry -> disposition -> artifact id) exists in notes/; every category-(b) entry has a store artifact; fresh-builder check: the 10 most-cited feedback memories of this list are readable from the repo alone.

**Validation:** the triage table artifact + resolvable artifact ids.

audit-emphasis: doc-only

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: 146 local memories triaged whole-corpus (72 mirrored / 44 already-durable / 30 stay-local, table in notes/builder-memory-triage.20260708.md): 4 new rules (dispatch, autonomy, git-workflow, design-doctrine) + safeguards Igor-live conditionality + preferred_paths inference-proxy/skills-symlink entries + notes/builder-gotchas + notes/device-roster. Fresh-builder top-10 check passes from repo alone (pinned in tests/test_builder_memory_residency.py, 4 tests). No local deletions. Proof red=AssertionError green=passed @8ebe84c8. Follow-on design Q noted in the triage note: automation of future local-to-repo sync (out of scope).
body.intention: I intend that a fresh builder on any box inherits the corrected working style from the repo, not from one instance's private memory dir.
